holdings.infoBox: CNAV is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Western Digital stock at 9.73%, Sandisk at 6.39%, Astera Labs at 4.55%, Advanced Micro Devices at 4.46%, and Dell Technologies at 4.34%.

overview.description: The Mohr Company Nav ETF (CNAV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation by tactically investing in large-cap companies across various US market sectors. Stock selection is based on price movements within industries of the S&P 500 index. CNAV was launched on Oct 1, 2024 and is issued by Mohr Funds.
